ddls:
CREATE TABLE "auctions" (
  "auction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each auction */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being auctioned */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the auction */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the auction */,
  "reserve_price" INTEGER /* Reserve price of the item (minimum acceptable bid) */,
  "minimum_bid" INTEGER /* Minimum bid amount for the auction */,
  "current_highest_bid" INTEGER /* Current highest bid on the item */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the auction (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller who created the auction */,
  "auction_type" TEXT /* Type of auction (e.g., standard, reserve, charity) */,
  "bid_increment" INTEGER /* Minimum bid increment for the auction */,
  "status_updated_at" TEXT /* Time when the auction status was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the auction */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Special rules or conditions for the auction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auctions_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auctions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bids" (
  "bid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bid */,
  "bid_time" TEXT /* Time the bid was placed */,
  "bid_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the bid */,
  "bidder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bidder */,
  "auction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the auction the bid is placed on */,
  "bid_status" TEXT /* Status of the bid (e.g., active, withdrawn, accepted) */,
  "bid_withdrawn_at" TEXT /* Time the bid was withdrawn */,
  "bid_withdrawn_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who withdrew the bid */,
  "bid_source" TEXT /* Source of the bid (e.g., web, mobile app, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bids_bidder_id FOREIGN KEY ("bidder_id") REFERENCES bidders ("bidder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bids_auction_id FOREIGN KEY ("auction_id") REFERENCES auctions ("auction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bidders" (
  "bidder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bidder */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the bidder */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the bidder */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the bidder */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the bidder */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the bidder */,
  "bid_count" INTEGER /* Number of bids placed by the bidder */,
  "total_spent" INTEGER /* Total amount spent by the bidder */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the bidder joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the bidder logged in */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the bidder's account is verified */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Referral code used by the bidder */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score or trustworthiness of the bidder */,
  "is_suspended" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the bidder's account is suspended */,
  "suspension_reason" TEXT /* Reason for suspension */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bidder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the item */,
  "starting_bid" INTEGER /* Starting bid amount for the item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the item */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the item (e.g., new, used, like new) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the item */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the item */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the item */,
  "shipping_info" TEXT /* Shipping information for the item */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller who listed the item */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the item has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the seller */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the seller */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the seller */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the seller */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the seller */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the seller joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the seller logged in */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the seller's account is verified */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score or trustworthiness of the seller */,
  "is_suspended" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the seller's account is suspended */,
  "suspension_reason" TEXT /* Reason for suspension */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auction_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "auction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the auction the rule applies to */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of rule (e.g., reserve price, bid increment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auction_rules_auction_id FOREIGN KEY ("auction_id") REFERENCES auctions ("auction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bid_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "bid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bid */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., placed, withdrawn, accepted) */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Time the action was taken */,
  "action_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bid_history_bid_id FOREIGN KEY ("bid_id") REFERENCES bids ("bid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bid_history_action_by FOREIGN KEY ("action_by") REFERENCES bidders ("bidder_id")
)
